title: EQ - Select a value, close the EQ tab, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ preset selection does not persist after closing and reopening the EQ tab in Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Close the EQ tab by tapping the back arrow or swiping down
Reopen the EQ tab by navigating back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer
Verify the selected EQ preset is still Bass
Repeat steps 5-9 for each remaining EQ preset: Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ
expected: The previously selected EQ value (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ) persists and is displayed as selected when the EQ tab is reopened after being closed.
